name: Athletics
description: Physical strength and endurance for climbing, jumping, and lifting.

name: Acrobatics
description: Balance, flexibility, and agility in movement.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: Quick hand tricks for stealing or manipulating objects.

name: Stealth
description: Ability to move silently and remain unseen.

name: Arcana
description: Knowledge of magic, spells, and magical lore.

name: History
description: Knowledge of historical events and figures.

name: Investigation
description: Skill in uncovering clues and solving mysteries.

name: Religion
description: Understanding of gods, faiths, and divine practices.

name: Nature
description: Knowledge of the natural world and creatures.

name: Animal Handling
description: Ability to calm or control animals.

name: Insight
description: Reading emotions and intentions of others.

name: Perception
description: Noticing hidden details and environmental cues.

name: Survival
description: Living off the land and navigating wilderness.

name: Intimidation
description: Using presence or threats to influence others.

name: Performance
description: Entertaining others through art or talent.

name: Persuasion
description: Convincing others through charm or reasoning.

name: Sneak Attack
description: Deal extra damage when striking from stealth.

name: Parkour
description: Move quickly across obstacles and terrain.

name: Shadow Step
description: Teleport between shadows a short distance.

name: Fireball
description: Cast a powerful explosive ball of fire.

name: Wrong Spell
description: Accidentally cast an unintended spell with random effects.

name: Spell Echo
description: Repeat a recently cast spell at reduced power.

name: Rage
description: Enter a furious state that boosts strength and damage.

name: Reckless Swing
description: Sacrifice defense for a stronger attack.

name: Battle Roar
description: Let out a roar that intimidates enemies.

name: Sick Lick
description: Play an impressive musical riff that inspires allies.

name: Distracting Solo
description: Perform a solo that distracts enemies.

name: Stab
description: A straightforward and reliable melee attack.

name: Tactical Yelling
description: Shout commands that boost ally morale.

name: Shield Bash
description: Bash an enemy with a shield to stagger them.

name: Judgy Heal
description: Heal allies while silently judging them.

name: Divine ""I told you so""
description: Heal allies with smug divine energy.

name: Smite
description: Deal bonus radiant damage to enemies.

name: Mage Hand
description: Summon a spectral hand to interact with objects.

name: Fury Strike
description: A stronger melee attack fueled by anger.

name: Ground Slam
description: Smash the ground to damage nearby enemies.

name: War Cry
description: Boost allies with a powerful shout.

name: Second Wind
description: Recover a small amount of health.

name: Minor Heal
description: Restore a small amount of health.

name: Radiant Pulse
description: Emit a burst of holy energy.

name: World Breaker
description: Massive attack that damages all nearby.

name: Ascension
description: Transform into a divine being briefly.
